# Visit Israel

> An independent, English-language travel guide to Israel covering 11 regions, their
> attractions, ready-made itineraries and practical planning advice. All content is
> editorially researched; booking links are affiliate links.

## Key facts about Israel for travellers

- Israel is a country in the Eastern Mediterranean / Middle East. Main international gateway: Ben Gurion Airport (TLV) near Tel Aviv.
- Currency: Israeli new shekel (ILS, ₪). Cards are widely accepted.
- Languages: Hebrew and Arabic (official); English is widely spoken.
- Best time to visit: spring (March–May) and autumn (September–November).
- Shabbat (Friday afternoon to Saturday nightfall) pauses most public transport and many Jewish-owned businesses; Tel Aviv and Arab/Christian areas are less affected.
- Visa: many nationalities (US, UK, EU, Canada, Australia, etc.) enter visa-free for up to 90 days; verify current rules per nationality.
- Safety: the main tourist areas are heavily policed and generally calm; travellers should consult their government's current advisory before visiting.

## The 11 regions

- Jerusalem: https://visitisrael.site/jerusalem — Old City, Western Wall, Church of the Holy Sepulchre, Temple Mount, Mahane Yehuda, Yad Vashem.
- Tel Aviv: https://visitisrael.site/tel-aviv — beaches, Bauhaus White City, Old Jaffa, Carmel Market, nightlife.
- Dead Sea: https://visitisrael.site/dead-sea — lowest point on Earth (~430 m below sea level), Masada, Ein Gedi, Qumran, mineral spas.
- Galilee: https://visitisrael.site/galilee — Sea of Galilee, Capernaum, Mount of Beatitudes, Tiberias, Tzfat (Safed), wineries.
- Eilat: https://visitisrael.site/eilat — Red Sea diving, Coral Beach, Underwater Observatory, Timna Park, day trips to Petra.
- Negev: https://visitisrael.site/negev — Makhtesh Ramon crater, Mitzpe Ramon, Avdat, Ein Avdat, Bedouin hospitality, stargazing.
- Nazareth: https://visitisrael.site/nazareth — Basilica of the Annunciation, old city market, Mount Precipice.
- Haifa: https://visitisrael.site/haifa — Bahá'í Gardens, German Colony, Stella Maris, Mount Carmel.
- Golan Heights: https://visitisrael.site/golan — wineries, Nimrod Fortress, Banias waterfall, Mount Bental, Mount Hermon.
- Caesarea: https://visitisrael.site/caesarea — Roman theatre, Herodian harbour, aqueduct beach.
- Akko (Acre): https://visitisrael.site/akko — UNESCO Crusader old city, Hospitaller halls, Templar tunnel, Turkish bazaar.

- First time in Israel: https://visitisrael.site/first-time-in-israel
- Is Israel safe to visit: https://visitisrael.site/is-israel-safe
- Getting around (transport): https://visitisrael.site/transportation
- Cost & budget: https://visitisrael.site/israel-cost-budget
- Best time to visit: https://visitisrael.site/best-time-to-visit-israel
- Shabbat guide: https://visitisrael.site/shabbat-guide
- Food & kosher guide: https://visitisrael.site/kosher-food-guide
- Visa information: https://visitisrael.site/visa-information
- Border crossings (Jordan/Egypt): https://visitisrael.site/border-crossings
- Itineraries (3/7-day and more): https://visitisrael.site/itineraries
